title: TSMC Raises 2026 Revenue Forecast on AI Chip Demand Surge
content: TSMC has raised its 2026 annual revenue forecast citing surging demand for AI accelerator chips. The company now expects full-year revenue growth of 28-30%, up from the previous 25-27% guidance. Management noted that CoWoS advanced packaging capacity remains the primary bottleneck and will be expanded aggressively through year-end.
author: fixture
